---
title: "Rachel Russell"
---

## Rachel Russell

**Dates:** (1636-1723)

**Maiden name:** (Wriothesley), Lady

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by the \'author of Magdalen Stafford\' in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
